description: Evidence about how Hall and two-fluid (whistler / di-layer) physics modify the ideal-MHD m=1 picture at finite d_i/R, where Kumar's asymptotic ideal limit does not apply.

open_questions.question: Which of the 2 surviving tension(s) in this group are real disagreements vs. extraction or comparability artifacts?

suggested_next_steps.description: Inspect each remaining high-residual edge inside this group against the source PDFs and decide whether the edge, regime tag, or claim scope is wrong.
suggested_next_steps.title: Residual edge review

open_questions.question: Are the implicit-headline claim(s) SE_01, SH_01 actually intended to generalize across this group, or do their authors scope them more narrowly than the propagator assumes?

suggested_next_steps.description: Read each implicit-headline claim's source paper and decide whether to add explicit out-of-regime predictions or to mark the claim as scoped only to its home regime.
suggested_next_steps.title: Scope verification

remaining_tensions.interpretation: SE_01 still predicts poorly at ev_shiraishi_dilayer after allowed rewrites.
SH_01 still predicts poorly at ev_sainterme_whistler after allowed rewrites.

scope.framework: Hall MHD; MHD literature; whistler instability
scope.system: Hall-MHD plasma; Hall-MHD singular layer; magnetized plasma

title: Hall / two-fluid corrections at finite d_i/R
